claim_boundary: Native robot + semi-implicit rope release/drop sanity baseline: visible support, release, gravity-driven free fall, real ground contact, readable 1:1 video.
hard_fail_reasons: sampled transitions are too static for conservative acceptance

evidence.observation: Review bundle contains evenly sampled frames across the video.

missing_or_ambiguous: no separate manual skeptical review JSON was provided; fail closed until a reviewer cites timestamps and frames
summary: FAIL closed. Either a hard-fail criterion triggered or no separate skeptical reviewer supplied a defensible PASS.
